title: Getting Started
text: echoLD echoverse module retrieving processing linkage disequilibrium (LD) matrices. supports multiple LD reference panels: 1000 Genomes Phase 1 Phase 3 (computed --fly VCF) UK Biobank (pre-computed LD matrices) Custom VCF files supplied user Pre-computed LD matrices .rds, .csv, .tsv format

title: Getting Started
text: examples use bundled data echodata package: subset summary statistics BST1 locus pre-computed LD matrix.
code: library(echoLD) query_dat <- echodata::BST1[seq_len(50), ] locus_dir <- file.path(tempdir(), echodata::locus_dir) LD_matrix <- echodata::BST1_LD_matrix

title: Getting Started
text: already LD matrix disk, get_LD_matrix() reads aligns summary statistics.
code: ## Write the bundled LD matrix to a temp CSV to demonstrate the workflow LD_path <- tempfile(fileext = ".csv") utils::write.csv(LD_matrix, file = LD_path, row.names = TRUE)  LD_list <- echoLD::get_LD_matrix(     locus_dir = locus_dir,     query_dat = query_dat,     LD_reference = LD_path ) #> Using custom VCF as LD reference panel. #> Previously computed LD_matrix detected. Importing: /tmp/RtmpOpB4Go/file616f43163f38.csv #> LD_reference identified as: table. #> Converting obj to sparseMatrix. #> Checking LD metric (r/r2). #> 45 x 45 LD_matrix (sparse) #> Converting obj to sparseMatrix. #> Saving sparse LD matrix ==> /tmp/RtmpOpB4Go/results/GWAS/Nalls23andMe_2019/BST1/LD/BST1.custom_r_LD.RDS

title: Getting Started
text: can compute LD --fly VCF file. echodata package ships small 1000 Genomes Phase 3 VCF BST1 locus.
code: LD_reference <- system.file("extdata", "BST1.1KGphase3.vcf.bgz",                             package = "echodata") LD_vcf <- echoLD::get_LD_vcf(     locus_dir = locus_dir,     query_dat = query_dat,     LD_reference = LD_reference ) #> Using custom VCF as LD reference panel. #> ========= echotabix::query ========= #> Constructing GRanges query using min/max ranges across one or more chromosomes. #> + as_blocks=TRUE: Will query a single range per chromosome that covers all regions requested (plus anything in between). #> Explicit format: 'vcf' #> Querying VCF tabix file. #> Querying VCF file using: VariantAnnotation #> Checking query chromosome style is correct. #> Chromosome format: 1 #> Retrieving data. #> Time difference of 0.3 secs #> Removing 50 / 100 non-overlapping SNPs. #> Saving VCF subset ==> /tmp/RtmpOpB4Go/VCF/RtmpOpB4Go.chr4-14884541-16649679.BST1.1KGphase3.vcf.bgz #> Time difference of 0.2 secs #> Retrieved data with 50 rows across 10 samples. #> echoLD::snpStats:: `MAF` column already present. #> echoLD:snpStats:: Computing pairwise LD between 50 SNPs across 10 individuals (stats = R). #> Time difference of 0 secs #> 50 x 50 LD_matrix (sparse) #> Converting obj to sparseMatrix. #> Saving sparse LD matrix ==> /tmp/RtmpOpB4Go/results/GWAS/Nalls23andMe_2019/BST1/LD/BST1.BST1.1KGphase3.vcf.bgz_LD.RDS

title: Getting Started
text: Querying full 1000 Genomes VCF requires downloading chromosome-level VCF files remote server. requires internet connection can take several minutes.
code: LD_1kgp3 <- echoLD::get_LD(     locus_dir = locus_dir,     query_dat = query_dat,     LD_reference = "1KGphase3" )

title: Getting Started
text: Pre-computed LD British European-descent subset UK Biobank. Note: takes substantially longer 1000 Genomes methods.
code: LD_ukb <- echoLD::get_LD(     locus_dir = locus_dir,     query_dat = query_dat,     LD_reference = "UKB",     download_method = "axel",     nThread = 10 )

title: Getting Started
text: Use filter_LD() remove SNPs minimum r2 threshold.
code: LD_list_full <- list(LD = LD_matrix, DT = echodata::BST1) LD_list_filt <- echoLD::filter_LD(LD_list = LD_list_full, min_r2 = 0.2) dim(LD_list_filt$LD) #> [1] 3 3

title: Getting Started
text: echoLD provides helpers working sparse LD matrices, reduce file size substantially.
code: ## Convert a dense matrix to sparse format sparse_mat <- echoLD::to_sparse(X = LD_matrix) #> Converting obj to sparseMatrix. class(sparse_mat) #> [1] "dsCMatrix" #> attr(,"package") #> [1] "Matrix"  ## Save to disk sparse_path <- echoLD::saveSparse(LD_matrix = LD_matrix) #> Converting obj to sparseMatrix. #> Saving sparse LD matrix ==> /tmp/RtmpOpB4Go/file616f6c69712f.rds file.info(sparse_path)$size #> [1] 22452  ## Read it back sparse_read <- echoLD::readSparse(LD_path = sparse_path) #> LD_reference identified as: r. #> Converting obj to sparseMatrix. dim(sparse_read) #> [1] 95 95

title: Getting Started
text: Plot heatmap pairwise LD around lead SNP.
code: echoLD::plot_LD(     LD_matrix = LD_matrix,     query_dat = echodata::BST1,     span = 10 )

title: Authors and Citation
text: Brian M Schilder, Jack Humphrey, Towfique Raj (2021). echolocatoR: automated end--end statistical functional genomic fine-mapping pipeline. Bioinformatics, btab658. https://doi.org/10.1093/bioinformatics/btab658
code: @Article{,   title = {echolocatoR: an automated end-to-end statistical and functional genomic fine-mapping pipeline},   author = {Brian M Schilder and Jack Humphrey and Towfique Raj},   journal = {Bioinformatics},   year = {2021},   volume = {btab658},   url = {https://doi.org/10.1093/bioinformatics/btab658}, }

what: echoLD: Echoverse module: LD downloading and processing.
title: Echoverse Module: LD Downloading and Processing
text: R package part echoverse suite supports echolocatoR: automated genomic fine-mapping pipeline. use echoLD, please cite: Brian M Schilder, Jack Humphrey, Towfique Raj (2021). echolocatoR: automated end--end statistical functional genomic fine-mapping pipeline. Bioinformatics, btab658. https://doi.org/10.1093/bioinformatics/btab658

title: Echoverse Module: LD Downloading and Processing
code: if(!require("BiocManager")) install.packages("BiocManager")  BiocManager::install("RajLabMSSM/echoLD") library(echoLD)

title: Echoverse Module: LD Downloading and Processing
text: Brian M. Schilder, Bioinformatician IIRaj LabDepartment Neuroscience, Icahn School Medicine Mount Sinai

title: Translate superpopulation acronyms — check_population_1kg
text: Ensures common ontology synonymous superpopulation names.

title: Translate superpopulation acronyms — check_population_1kg
code: check_population_1kg(superpopulation, LD_reference)

title: Translate superpopulation acronyms — check_population_1kg
text: superpopulation Superpopulation subset LD panel (used LD_reference "1KGphase1" "1KGphase3"). See popDat_1KGphase1 popDat_1KGphase3 full tables respective samples. LD_reference LD reference use: 1KGphase1 1000 Genomes Project Phase 1 (genome build: hg19). 1KGphase3 1000 Genomes Project Phase 3 (genome build: hg19). UKB Pre-computed LD British European-decent subset UK Biobank. Genome build : hg19 <vcf_path> User-supplied path custom VCF file compute LD matrix .Accepted formats: .vcf / .vcf.gz / .vcf.bgzGenome build : defined user target_genome. <matrix_path> User-supplied path pre-computed LD matrix. Accepted formats: .rds / .rda / .csv / .tsv / .txtGenome build : defined user target_genome.

what: Get LD using snpStats package — compute_LD
title: Get LD using snpStats package — compute_LD
text: Get LD using snpStats package

title: Get LD using snpStats package — compute_LD
code: compute_LD(   ss,   select_snps = NULL,   stats = c("R"),   symmetric = TRUE,   depth = "max",   as_sparse = TRUE,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Get LD using snpStats package — compute_LD
text: snpStats Bioconductor page LD tutorial

title: Get LD using snpStats package — compute_LD
text: stats character vector specifying linkage disequilibrium measures     calculated. contain one strings: "LLR",     "", "Q", "Covar", "D.prime",     "R.squared", ad "R" symmetric y argument supplied argument controls format     output band matrices. TRUE, symmetric matrices     returned , otherwise, upper triangular matrices returned depth y supplied, parameter mandatory     controls maximum lag columns x     considered. Thus, LD statistics calculated x[,]     x[,j] j differ     depth

title: Compute LD blocks — compute_LD_blocks
text: Compute LD blocks using snpClust.

title: Compute LD blocks — compute_LD_blocks
code: compute_LD_blocks(   x,   stats = c("R.squared", "D.prime"),   type = c("capushe", "bstick"),   k.max = NULL,   pct = 0.15,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Compute LD blocks — compute_LD_blocks
text: adjclust GitHub

title: Compute LD blocks — compute_LD_blocks
text: x either genotype matrix class SnpMatrix/matrix linkage disequilibrium matrix class dgCMatrix. latter case LD values expected [0,1] stats character vector specifying linkage disequilibrium measures calculated (using ld function) x genotype matrix. "R.squared" "D.prime" allowed, see Details. type model selection approach slope heuristic ("capushe") broken stick approach ("bstick") k.max maximum number clusters can selected. Default NULL, case set \(\min(\max(100, \frac{n}{\log(n)}), \frac{n}{2})\) \(n\) number objects clustered capushe \(n\) broken stick model pct minimum percentage points plateau selection capushe selection. See DDSE details verbose Print messages.

title: Download UKB LD — download_UKB_LD
text: Download UK Biobank Linkage Disequilibrium, pre-computed 3Mb windows Alkes Price lab (Broad Institute).

title: Download UKB LD — download_UKB_LD
code: download_UKB_LD(   LD.prefixes,   locus_dir,   bucket = "s3://broad-alkesgroup-ukbb-ld/",   background = TRUE,   force_overwrite = FALSE,   nThread = 1,   verbose = TRUE,   ... )

title: Download UKB LD — download_UKB_LD
text: locus_dir Storage directory use. bucket Character string name bucket, object class “s3_bucket”. force_overwrite Overwrite existing file. nThread Number threads parallelise across (applicable). verbose Print messages. ... Arguments passed downloadR::aws input_url URL remote file. output_path file name want save download .

title: Filter LD — filter_LD
code: LD_list <- list(LD = echodata::BST1_LD_matrix,                 DT = echodata::BST1) LD_list2 <- echoLD::filter_LD(LD_list = LD_list, min_r2 = .2)

what: Procure an LD matrix for fine-mapping — get_LD
title: Procure an LD matrix for fine-mapping — get_LD
text: Calculate /query linkage disequilibrium (LD) reference panels  (UK Biobank, 1000 Genomes), user-supplied pre-computed LD matrix. need , query_dat automatically lifted genome build target LD panel query performed.

title: Procure an LD matrix for fine-mapping — get_LD
code: get_LD(   query_dat,   locus_dir = tempdir(),   standardise_colnames = FALSE,   force_new_LD = FALSE,   LD_reference = c("1KGphase1", "1KGphase3", "UKB"),   query_genome = "hg19",   target_genome = "hg19",   samples = character(0),   superpopulation = NULL,   local_storage = NULL,   leadSNP_LD_block = FALSE,   fillNA = 0,   verbose = TRUE,   remove_tmps = TRUE,   as_sparse = TRUE,   subset_common = TRUE,   download_method = "axel",   conda_env = "echoR_mini",   nThread = 1 )

title: Procure an LD matrix for fine-mapping — get_LD
text: query_dat SNP-level summary statistics subset query LD panel . locus_dir Storage directory use. standardise_colnames Automatically rename columns standard nomenclature using standardise_header. force_new_LD Force new LD subset. LD_reference LD reference use: 1KGphase1 1000 Genomes Project Phase 1 (genome build: hg19). 1KGphase3 1000 Genomes Project Phase 3 (genome build: hg19). UKB Pre-computed LD British European-decent subset UK Biobank. Genome build : hg19 <vcf_path> User-supplied path custom VCF file compute LD matrix .Accepted formats: .vcf / .vcf.gz / .vcf.bgzGenome build : defined user target_genome. <matrix_path> User-supplied path pre-computed LD matrix. Accepted formats: .rds / .rda / .csv / .tsv / .txtGenome build : defined user target_genome. query_genome Genome build query_dat. target_genome Genome build LD panel. automatically assigned correct genome build LD panel  except user supplies custom vcf/LD files. samples [Optional] Sample names subset VCF . option used, GRanges object converted ScanVcfParam usage readVcf. superpopulation Superpopulation subset LD panel (used LD_reference "1KGphase1" "1KGphase3"). See popDat_1KGphase1 popDat_1KGphase3 full tables respective samples. local_storage Storage folder previously downloaded LD files. LD_reference "1KGphase1" "1KGphase3", local_storage VCF files stored. LD_reference "UKB", local_storage LD compressed numpy array (npz) files stored. Set NULL download VCFs/LD npz remote storage system. leadSNP_LD_block return SNPs within LD block lead SNP (SNP smallest p-value). fillNA Value fill LD matrix NAs . verbose Print messages. remove_tmps Remove intermediate files like vcf, npz, plink files. as_sparse Convert LD matrix sparse matrix. subset_common Subset LD_matrix dat SNPs common . download_method Download method use: "axel" Multi-threaded "wget" Single-threaded "download.file" Single-threaded "internal" Single-threaded (passed download.file) "wininet" Single-threaded (passed download.file) "libcurl" Single-threaded (passed download.file) "curl" Single-threaded (passed download.file) conda_env Conda environment use. nThread Number threads parallelise across (applicable).

title: Procure an LD matrix for fine-mapping — get_LD
text: named list containing: LD Symmetric LD matrix pairwise SNP correlations. DT Standardised query data filtered SNPs included query_dat LD matrix. path path LD matrix saved.

title: Compute LD from 1000 Genomes — get_LD_1KG

title: Compute LD from 1000 Genomes — get_LD_1KG
code: get_LD_1KG(   locus_dir,   query_dat,   query_genome = "hg19",   LD_reference = "1KGphase1",   superpopulation = NULL,   samples = character(0),   local_storage = NULL,   leadSNP_LD_block = FALSE,   force_new = FALSE,   force_new_maf = FALSE,   fillNA = 0,   stats = "R",   as_sparse = TRUE,   subset_common = TRUE,   remove_tmps = TRUE,   conda_env = "echoR_mini",   nThread = 1,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Compute LD from 1000 Genomes — get_LD_1KG
text: locus_dir Storage directory use. query_dat SNP-level summary statistics subset query LD panel . query_genome Genome build query_dat. LD_reference LD reference use: 1KGphase1 1000 Genomes Project Phase 1 (genome build: hg19). 1KGphase3 1000 Genomes Project Phase 3 (genome build: hg19). UKB Pre-computed LD British European-decent subset UK Biobank. Genome build : hg19 <vcf_path> User-supplied path custom VCF file compute LD matrix .Accepted formats: .vcf / .vcf.gz / .vcf.bgzGenome build : defined user target_genome. <matrix_path> User-supplied path pre-computed LD matrix. Accepted formats: .rds / .rda / .csv / .tsv / .txtGenome build : defined user target_genome. superpopulation Superpopulation subset LD panel (used LD_reference "1KGphase1" "1KGphase3"). LD_reference "1KGphase1" "1KGphase3", local_storage VCF files stored. LD_reference "UKB", local_storage LD compressed numpy array (npz) files stored. Set NULL download VCFs/LD npz remote storage system. leadSNP_LD_block return SNPs within LD block lead SNP (SNP smallest p-value). fillNA pairwise LD (r) two SNPs NA, replace 0. as_sparse Save/return LD matrix sparse matrix. subset_common Subset LD_matrix dat SNPs common . remove_tmps Remove intermediate files like vcf, npz, plink files. conda_env Conda environment use. nThread Number threads parallelise across (applicable). verbose Print messages.

title: Download VCF subset from 1000 Genomes — get_LD_1KG_download_vcf
text: query_dat <- echodata::BST1 locus_dir <- file.path(tempdir(), echodata::locus_dir) query_granges <- echotabix::construct_query(query_dat=query_dat) vcf_subset.popDat <- echoLD:::get_LD_1KG_download_vcf(     query_granges = query_granges,     LD_reference = "1KGphase1",     locus_dir = locus_dir)

title: Download VCF subset from 1000 Genomes — get_LD_1KG_download_vcf
text: query_granges GRanges object used querying target_path file. Alternatively, can variant-level summary statistics converted GRanges object construct_query. query_genome Genome build query_dat. LD_reference LD reference use: 1KGphase1 1000 Genomes Project Phase 1 (genome build: hg19). 1KGphase3 1000 Genomes Project Phase 3 (genome build: hg19). UKB Pre-computed LD British European-decent subset UK Biobank. what: Download LD matrices from UK Biobank — get_LD_UKB
title: Download LD matrices from UK Biobank — get_LD_UKB
text: Download pre-computed LD matrices UK Biobank 3Mb windows, subset region overlaps query_dat. LD derived  British, European-decent subpopulation UK Biobank. LD pre-computed stored Alkes Price lab. data aligned hg19 reference genome. details, see PolyFun publication (doi:10.1038/s41588-020-00735-5 ).

title: Download LD matrices from UK Biobank — get_LD_UKB

title: Download LD matrices from UK Biobank — get_LD_UKB
text: query_dat SNP-level summary statistics subset query LD panel . query_genome Genome build query_dat. locus_dir Storage directory use. force_new_LD Force new LD subset. local_storage Path folder previously download LD npz files. download_method "python" import compressed numpy array directly R using reticulate. Otherwise, passed downloader download full 3Mb-window LD matrix first. fillNA Value fill LD matrix NAs . nThread Number threads parallelise across (applicable). as_sparse Convert LD matrix sparse matrix. conda_env Conda environment use. remove_tmps Remove intermediate files like vcf, npz, plink files. subset_common Subset LD_matrix dat SNPs common . verbose Print messages.

title: Get LD from pre-computed matrix — get_LD_matrix
text: locus_dir Storage directory use. query_dat SNP-level summary statistics subset query LD panel . LD_reference LD reference use: 1KGphase1 1000 Genomes Project Phase 1 (genome build: hg19). 1KGphase3 1000 Genomes Project Phase 3 (genome build: hg19). UKB Pre-computed LD British European-decent subset UK Biobank. Genome build : hg19 <vcf_path> User-supplied path custom VCF file compute LD matrix .Accepted formats: .vcf / .vcf.gz / .vcf.bgzGenome build : defined user target_genome. <matrix_path> User-supplied path pre-computed LD matrix. Accepted formats: .rds / .rda / .csv / .tsv / .txtGenome build : defined user target_genome. query_genome Genome build query_dat. target_genome Genome build LD panel. automatically assigned correct genome build LD panel  except user supplies custom vcf/LD files. fillNA pairwise LD two SNPs NA, replace 0. stats linkage disequilibrium measure calculated. Can "R" (default) "R.squared". as_sparse Convert LD matrix sparse matrix. subset_common Subset LD_matrix dat SNPs common . verbose Print messages.

title: Get LD from pre-computed matrix — get_LD_matrix
code: query_dat <-  echodata::BST1[seq(1, 50), ]  locus_dir <- file.path(tempdir(),  echodata::locus_dir) LD_reference <- tempfile(fileext = ".csv") utils::write.csv(echodata::BST1_LD_matrix,                  file = LD_reference,                  row.names = TRUE) LD_list <- get_LD_matrix(     locus_dir = locus_dir,     query_dat = query_dat,     LD_reference = LD_reference) #> Using custom VCF as LD reference panel. #> Previously computed LD_matrix detected. Importing: /tmp/Rtmpyv53td/file5f9f2e577143.csv #> LD_reference identified as: table. #> Converting obj to sparseMatrix. #> Checking LD metric (r/r2). #> 45 x 45 LD_matrix (sparse) #> Converting obj to sparseMatrix. #> Saving sparse LD matrix ==> /tmp/Rtmpyv53td/results/GWAS/Nalls23andMe_2019/BST1/LD/BST1.custom_r_LD.RDS

title: Compute LD from VCF file — get_LD_vcf
text: locus_dir Storage directory use. query_dat SNP-level summary statistics subset query LD panel . LD_reference LD reference use: 1KGphase1 1000 Genomes Project Phase 1 (genome build: hg19). 1KGphase3 1000 Genomes Project Phase 3 (genome build: hg19). UKB Pre-computed LD British European-decent subset UK Biobank. Genome build : hg19 <vcf_path> User-supplied path custom VCF file compute LD matrix .Accepted formats: .vcf / .vcf.gz / .vcf.bgzGenome build : defined user target_genome. <matrix_path> User-supplied path pre-computed LD matrix. Accepted formats: .rds / .rda / .csv / .tsv / .txtGenome build : defined user target_genome. query_genome Genome build query_dat. target_genome Genome build LD panel. automatically assigned correct genome build LD panel  except user supplies custom vcf/LD files. superpopulation Superpopulation subset LD panel (used LD_reference "1KGphase1" "1KGphase3"). See popDat_1KGphase1 popDat_1KGphase3 full tables respective samples. samples [Optional] Sample names subset VCF . option used, GRanges object converted ScanVcfParam usage readVcf. overlapping_only Remove variants overlap positions query_dat. leadSNP_LD_block return SNPs within LD block lead SNP (SNP smallest p-value). force_new Force creation new VCF subset file even one exists. force_new_maf Download UKB_MAF file . fillNA pairwise LD two SNPs NA, replace 0. stats LD stats r as_sparse Convert LD matrix sparse matrix. subset_common Subset LD_matrix dat SNPs common . remove_tmps Remove intermediate files like vcf, npz, plink files. nThread Number threads parallelise across (applicable). conda_env Conda environment use. verbose Print messages.

title: Compute LD from VCF file — get_LD_vcf
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ query_dat <-  echodata::BST1[seq(1, 50), ] locus_dir <- echodata::locus_dir locus_dir <- file.path(tempdir(), locus_dir) LD_reference <- system.file("extdata", "BST1.1KGphase3.vcf.bgz",     package = "echodata" ) LD_list <- get_LD_vcf(     locus_dir = locus_dir,     query_dat = query_dat,     LD_reference = LD_reference) } # }
